name: Acidic Aftershock
treatment: Applying a soothing salve or receiving gentle massages can help calm the acidic aftershock. Rest and relaxation are recommended to ease the residual tingling sensation.
description: As the initial burn subsides, a lingering tingling sensation spreads through your body, making every movement feel like a small jolt of electricity. It's as if the acid left a parting gift of prickling discomfort to remind you of its potent presence.

name: Corrosive Consequences
treatment: Immediate decontamination and neutralization of the acid are paramount to limit the spread of the corrosive consequences. Thoroughly rinsing the affected area with water and seeking medical attention can help prevent further tissue damage.
description: The searing touch of acid leaves behind a trail of corrosive consequences, etching its mark on your flesh with a cruel and unforgiving touch. Each drop sizzles and seethes, dissolving everything it touches in a symphony of destruction.

name: Fizzbang Fiasco
treatment: Wash the affected area with vinegar-infused soap and rest for 24 hours.
description: During a battle, a mischievous goblin throws a flask of fizzing and popping concoction that you mistake for ale. Your skin becomes bright green and emits a faint smell of citrus. You feel charged with energy but realize you can no longer stand up straight!

name: Fizzler's Folly
treatment: The only cure seems to be a sip from a flask carried by the alchemist, but you must seek him out first.
description: After an encounter with a mischievous alchemist, you find your limbs randomly emitting harmless bubbles that pop with noxious gas. So far, they smell of strawberries but who knows what's next!

name: Hissing Haze
treatment: Keeping the affected area clean and dry can help reduce the hissing haze's effects. Avoiding further exposure to irritants and maintaining a calm environment can alleviate the discomfort caused by the unsettling auditory backdrop.
description: A faint hissing sound accompanies the acid's contact with your skin, creating an eerie backdrop to the searing pain. It's as though the very air around you echoes the potent potency of the acid, enveloping you in a disconcerting auditory haze.

name: Melting Misery
treatment: Cooling the affected area with ice packs or seeking shelter from heat sources can slow down the melting misery. Rest and hydration are crucial to counteract the disintegrating sensation caused by the acid's corrosive touch.
description: The acid's insidious effects deepen, causing a sensation akin to melting to seep through your skin. Each movement feels like a slow dissolution, as if you're gradually losing form and cohesion under the acidic assault.

name: Pickle Puddle Pains
treatment: A thorough soak in fresh water might dilute the acidic transformation, but don't ask about the side effects.
description: Your feet have transformed into pickle jars, complete with the light crunch of pickles as you walk. Sadly, the aroma has attracted some rather odd creatures to follow you around.

name: Sizzling Surprise
treatment: Cooling the affected area with a damp cloth or seeking shade can alleviate the sizzling surprise. Hydration and avoiding heat sources can help regulate your body temperature during this unexpected heat wave.
description: A sudden wave of heat radiates from the acid-affected area, causing beads of sweat to form on your forehead. It's as though a hidden furnace has been activated within you, turning up the heat in an unexpected and uncomfortable manner.

name: Sour Grapes Syndrome
treatment: The affected individual can counteract the effects of Sour Grapes Syndrome with regular applications of sweetened almond oil to the affected areas.
description: Those affected by Sour Grapes Syndrome find their skin enrobed in a faint shade of violet, emitting an unpleasant vinegar-like odor. Physical touch may result in a mild burning sensation. Caution: prolonged exposure may cause spontaneous fermentation.

name: Sour Note Symphony
treatment: Someone skilled in bardic arts might be able to 'tune' your voice back to normal, but be prepared for an impromptu performance or two.
description: Your voice has taken a musical turn, emitting a range of sour, yet oddly catchy notes every time you try to speak. Your party is considering earplugs as a necessity.

name: Spicy Surprise
treatment: Diluting the acid with a herbal remedy or magical poultice can help neutralize the effects.
description: After a run-in with a mischievous alchemist's pet, you now have a burning sensation coursing through your veins. The taste of copper fills your mouth, and every sip of water feels like torture.

name: Battered and Bruised Ballet
treatment: Engaging in gentle physical therapy and maintaining a balanced diet can assist in recovery from the battered and bruised ballet. Rest and gradual reintroduction to physical activity are recommended to prevent setbacks.
description: Amidst the chaos of battle, your movements resemble a battered and bruised ballet, choreographed by the unseen hands of your adversaries. Each step becomes a delicate balance between grace and agony, as you dance to the tune of bludgeoning blows.

name: Bone Rattle
treatment: Consult a skilled cleric or wizard to realign your bones and provide some magical stability.
description: Your entire skeletal structure rattles with each movement, causing discomfort and the occasional eerie sound effect.

name: Bruised Ego
treatment: A boost to morale from companions or a swift victory in combat may help restore your shaken confidence.
description: Your confidence takes a hit along with your body. Each attempt to impress or intimidate others is met with an uncomfortable reminder of your recent defeat.

name: Clobbered Conundrum
treatment: Seeking immediate medical attention and rest are crucial to address the aftershocks of the clobbered conundrum. Monitoring for signs of concussion and taking precautions to prevent further head trauma are paramount.
description: A relentless barrage of blunt force assaults your senses, turning each impact into a cacophony of concussive chaos. It's like being caught in a tempest of blows, struggling to find solid ground amidst the whirlwind of strikes.

name: Cranial Cacophony
treatment: Complete silence and a mental breather can help calm the chaos in your mind.
description: Every thought feels like a cacophony of confusion in your head. Concentration on spells or complex tasks becomes an exhausting endeavor.

name: Dented Armor
treatment: Visit a skilled blacksmith to repair the armor while enjoying the tale of how you acquired the dent.
description: Your armor now sports a massive dent, reducing its protective properties but granting you a bit of extra character.

name: Pulpy Palm
treatment: Soak the hand in healing herbs and rest, avoiding putting weight or pressure on it.
description: One of your hands is mangled, making it painful and difficult to hold or wield objects effectively.

name: Pummeling Painscape
treatment: Utilizing pain management techniques and seeking medical evaluation for internal injuries are crucial in navigating the pummeling painscape. Rest and gentle stretching can aid in easing muscle soreness and tension.
description: The relentless pummeling transforms your body into a landscape of pain, where every contour is etched with the memory of each blow. Navigating this unforgiving painscape becomes a test of endurance, as you seek respite from the ceaseless assault.

name: Skin Canvas
treatment: Applying cold compresses and gentle massages to the affected areas can help reduce the pain and swelling of your bruises. Rest and avoiding further impact can aid in the healing process.
description: Each strike leaves a vivid mark on your body, painting a picture of your bruised and battered state. It's as if you've become a canvas for the artistic expressions of those wielding blunt weapons, showcasing a palette of purples and blues.

name: Squishy Ears
treatment: Gently massage the ears with healing salve and rest in a quiet place.
description: After a particularly heavy slam to the head, your ears feel squishy, affecting your balance and ability to hear clearly.

name: The Leaning Warrior
treatment: Practice standing still on level ground and focus on correcting your posture.
description: Your body feels off-balance, causing you to lean to one side awkwardly. It's a real challenge to stand straight.

name: The Lopsided Lifter
treatment: Perform leg stretches and exercises to help realign your posture and gait.
description: One of your legs feels shorter than the other, causing you to walk with a humorous sway.

name: Thump and Tumble
treatment: Focusing on balance exercises and stability training can help mitigate the effects of thump and tumble. Resting and avoiding activities that exacerbate dizziness or loss of equilibrium are advised during recovery.
description: Every strike sends you reeling, causing a cascade of tumbles and falls in a slapstick symphony of misfortune. It's as if gravity has a personal vendetta against you, conspiring to turn each thump into an inevitable tumble.

name: Whacky Whiplash
treatment: Resting and avoiding sudden movements can help alleviate the clumsiness.
description: You suddenly find yourself unable to walk straight. Every step feels like a stumble and a trip waiting to happen, much to the amusement of your party members.

name: Arctic Awakening
treatment: Seeking a powerful mage of warmth to draw forth the latent heat within you is your only chance to escape becoming a permanent fixture in the snow.
description: A haze of frost surrounds you, your very breath crystallizing in the air. Your body becomes one with the winter landscape, as if the frost itself has claimed you as its own.

name: Frostbitten Fingertips
treatment: Rubbing your hands vigorously with infused frostweed oil and wearing insulated gloves will gradually restore sensation.
description: Your fingertips turn a frosty hue, feeling numb and unresponsive to touch. Even the warmest flames offer only fleeting relief as the cold magic's hold tightens.

name: Frosty Fingers
treatment: Warm up by the fire or use hand warmers to regain feeling and control in the frosty fingers.
description: The character's fingers have become numb and frostbitten, causing them to fumble with objects and weapons. Everything they touch turns to icicles, including their sense of dexterity.

name: Frozen Fingers
treatment: Warming up your hands with a cozy fire or a hot beverage can help thaw out your frozen digits. Avoiding further exposure to extreme cold is also advisable to prevent prolonged discomfort.
description: Your fingers become numb, turning a shade of blue that rivals the frost itself. Fumbling with objects becomes a comedy of errors as you struggle to maintain your grip, feeling as though you've unknowingly entered a slapstick routine.

name: Frozen Heartbeat
treatment: Drinking a steaming tonic brewed with hearthfire moss and receiving a warm embrace can help thaw the chill within.
description: Your heart beats to the slow, steady rhythm of an ancient glacier, each pulse sending a frigid shiver through your body. The winter's icy grasp threatens to freeze your very core.

name: Frozen Noggin
treatment: Consume a warm beverage, like a nice cup of tea, to help melt away the cold inside the brain.
description: The character's head has been chilled to the core, causing brain freeze and rendering them unable to concentrate. Spells may fizzle out unexpectedly and thoughts become as frozen as a winter fruit smoothie.

name: Icy Heart
treatment: Warmth can only be found in the heartfelt words of companions or by performing acts of kindness to melt the icy barriers around the heart.
description: The character's heart has been encased in ice, turning them into a cold, emotionless husk. Friendships freeze over, and love thaws out. They become as chilly as an iceberg in the ocean of feelings.

name: Slippery Slope Syndrome
treatment: Warm tea made from snowberry leaves and resting by a cozy fire will help alleviate symptoms.
description: You feel a sudden chill as if a mischievous winter spirit has taken up residency in your veins. Your movements become slightly clumsy, as if you're trying to ice skate on solid ground.

name: Slippery Slopes
treatment: Walk carefully on heated floors or wear warm, grippy socks to regain stability.
description: The character's feet have turned into blocks of ice, making walking as precarious as wearing socks on a frozen lake. Every step is a potential slip and slide, causing embarrassment and bruised tailbones.

name: Fiery Footsies
treatment: Cool your feet with water from a nearby source or a friend's water skin. Or maybe try doing a rain dance to summon a helpful drizzle. Or simply enjoy the warm ambiance.
description: You suddenly have an uncontrollable urge to do a hot shoe dance. Your feet, however, seem to be on fire, and despite your best efforts, you can't put them out! It's like having your own personal campfire.

name: Flaming Feathered Fiasco
treatment: Seek out a skilled chef for a taste of surprisingly beneficial spicy dishes with healing properties.
description: You find a colorful, fiery feathered creature doing a triumphant dance. As you approach, it emits a brilliant burst of flames, leaving you with singed eyebrows and an unusual craving for spicy foods.

name: Marshmallow Fingers
treatment: Immerse fingers in ice-cold water for 1 hour or until the glow subsides
description: After a particularly intense encounter with a flame, your fingers now emanate a warm orange glow reminiscent of a perfectly toasted marshmallow. They are oddly satisfying to heat up cold soup, but be cautious when shaking hands!

name: Roasted Rump Injury
treatment: Cooling poultices or spells to soothe the burn
description: In the heat of battle, you experience a close encounter with a fire… wall torch maybe? Anyway, your backside got a little too toasty, leaving you with charred buttocks. The smell of burnt bacon follows you wherever you go.

name: Singed Beard Syndrome
treatment: Apply a soothing ointment made of aloe vera and crushed ice from a frost giant's freezer.
description: Lingering aftermath of an unexpected fireball mishap. Your once luscious beard now resembles a charcoal briquette. Smoke still rises whenever you speak.

name: Singed Socks Syndrome
treatment: Soak your feet in a potion of frost, or find a pair of enchanted ice skates to cool those tootsies down.
description: Suffering from Singed Socks Syndrome, your feet feel like they've danced on a bonfire. The heat emanating from your boots could roast a turkey. Be careful, or you might leave a trail of cinders behind.

name: Boop Nose
treatment: Gentle nosemassages.
description: A mischievous force playfully boops your nose at unexpected moments, causing irritation and distraction. The playful spirit makes it hard to focus as your nose tingles annoyingly.

name: Dancing Limbs
treatment: Impromptu dance breaks.
description: Your arms and legs move uncontrollably, as if dancing to an unseen tune. The bizarre movements can be quite entertaining to watch, but exhausting for you as it drains your energy.

name: Gravity Defiance
treatment: Inverting your perspective.
description: Your perception of gravity shifts randomly, causing disorientation and imbalance. Up becomes down and down becomes up, challenging your sense of direction whenever the force decides to play tricks on you.

name: Tickle Fingers
treatment: Giggling therapy sessions.
description: Whenever you try to grasp something, an invisible force tickles your fingers, causing you to fumble frequently. The mysterious energy surge overwhelms your hands, making precision tasks difficult.

name: Absurd Attraction Aura
treatment: Creating a designated space for items and organizing your surroundings can help reduce the chaos caused by the attraction aura. Being mindful of your proximity to objects can prevent inadvertent collisions.
description: Objects seemingly have a mind of their own in your vicinity, gravitating towards you in a bizarre display of magnetism. It's as if you've become a walking anomaly, attracting items with a peculiar sense of humor.

name: Dizzying Dance Dilemma
treatment: Finding a stable surface to rest on and focusing on a fixed point can help alleviate the vertigo induced by the dizzying dance dilemma. Slow, deliberate movements are key to navigating this impromptu dance floor without stumbling.
description: The world spins around you in a dizzying display of disorientation, turning your balance into a precarious waltz with unseen partners. It's a dance routine you never signed up for, with each step feeling like a misstep waiting to happen.

name: Fried Fringe
treatment: Trimming the fried ends may help minimize static buildup and reduce your urge to reach out and touch someone.
description: A sudden burst of lightning has singed your hair and clothes. Your fringe now crackles with energy, making you slightly jittery. It's a shocking fashion statement!

name: Shocking Bad Hair Day
treatment: Ground yourself by meditating on a grassy field for an hour.
description: Your hair stands on end like you've been electrified. It's not just a fashion statement; the static energy around you is causing mild shocks to anyone who gets too close, making teamwork a bit electrifying.

name: Shockwave Symphony
treatment: Resting in a calm environment and gentle grounding exercises can help silence the electric symphony playing in your muscles.
description: Your encounter with a powerful lightning strike leaves you resonating with a shockwave symphony. Vibrations ripple through you, causing sporadic involuntary movements.

name: The Lightning Conductor
treatment: Sit out in a storm for an hour and let it all discharge.
description: Your body has become a lightning rod, attracting bolts from the sky and nearby magic. While it's great for parties, it's not so fun when you're the only one glowing in the dark during stealth missions.

name: Thunderous Tingle
treatment: Taking shelter from any stormy weather and avoiding static-inducing fabrics can help reduce the lingering tingling sensation.
description: As lightning courses through your veins, you experience a thunderous tingle that leaves you feeling both exhilarated and slightly jittery. Beware of unexpected shivers!

name: Thunderous Tinnitus
treatment: Have a bard play soothing music for an evening.
description: During the last battle, a lightning strike has left you with the constant sound of thunder in your ears. The effect is worse during silences, making stealth a bit tricky while keeping you constantly on edge.

name: Zap Zap Fingers
treatment: Rest and avoid touching anything metal for a day.
description: You touched something electrifying and now your fingers feel tingly. Whenever you try to grab something, a small spark jumps. Sometimes it helps light candles, but other times it just zaps you.

name: Zapped Zest
treatment: Resting and avoiding loud noises can help calm your overexcited nerves.
description: After being zapped by lightning, you feel electrifyingly energized! But be careful, that extra zest might make you act impulsively for a while.

name: Curse Of The Lich
treatment: Embark on a perilous quest to find the remains of the long-forgotten lich or beseech a celestial being for deliverance from this nefarious curse.
description: A malevolent laughter echoes in your mind as a shadowy grasp tightens around your heart. The touch of undeath lingers, draining the vitality from your very soul.

name: Decaying Limb
treatment: Cleansing ritual or powerful restoration spell
description: A necrotic wound has caused one of your party member's limbs to decay slowly. The affected limb feels heavy and sluggish, impacting their combat maneuvers and movement speed.

name: Frostbite Fingers
treatment: Intense heat exposure or magical healing
description: After a particularly frosty encounter, your party member's fingers have taken on a deathly chill. They find it difficult to handle objects or cast spells requiring delicate hand movements.

name: Goblin's Gloom
treatment: Seek the help of a powerful healer or visit a temple to rid yourself of this dark curse.
description: After rummaging through a goblin den, a dark aura seeps into your skin. Your limbs feel heavy, and a sense of dread fills your mind.

name: Skeletal Sneeze
treatment: Consume rare herbs from a forgotten grove or seek the aid of a seasoned druid to heal this spectral affliction.
description: As you investigate an ancient tomb, a ghostly presence causes a bone-chilling sneeze that leaves your body feeling frail and hollow.

name: Soul Erosion
treatment: Celestial intervention or potent healing magic
description: The touch of a powerful necrotic force has eroded a part of your party member's soul. They feel a deep sense of melancholy, affecting their will to fight and casting abilities.

name: Soul Shredder
treatment: Only the most potent of healers can mend the rift in your soul caused by this malevolent force. Seek out divine intervention or face a fate worse than death.
description: A soul-rending scream pierces the night, chilling you to the bone. Dark tendrils wrap around your spirit, threatening to tear it asunder.

name: Wight's Weakness
treatment: Purifying magic or potion of strength
description: A wight's touch has left your party member drained, feeling weaker and struggling to keep up with their companions. They find it harder to land hits in combat.

name: Beastly Puncture Wound
treatment: Bathe in moonlit water under the guidance of a wise treant. Apply a paste made from crushed sunstones to your wounds.
description: A mischievous goblin has replaced your veins with vines. Bleeding out? More like... watering. Sunlight exposure may lead to sprouting flowers from your ears.

name: Dragon's Pointed Reminder
treatment: Cool your wounds by swimming in a freezing glacier. Bring a smith to craft custom ice armor on the affected area.
description: A hyperactive dragon decided to leave a memento of your encounter by embedding a heated dragon's nail in your shoulder. Your new talents include boiling water by just touching it.

name: Impaled Appendage
treatment: The brutal impalement of an appendage sends waves of shock through the body, as the offending object pierces through muscle and bone with relentless force. Each movement a torment, as the impaled limb hangs in a precarious balance.
description: The brutal impalement of an appendage sends waves of shock through the body, as the offending object pierces through muscle and bone with relentless force. Each movement a torment, as the impaled limb hangs in a precarious balance.

name: Impaled Misery
treatment: Immediate medical attention needed to remove the impaling object and address the wound.
description: A severe injury has left the character impaled on a sharp object. The pain is excruciating, and movement is severely restricted as blood loss weakens the body.

name: Penetrating Trauma
treatment: Immediate wound assessment and appropriate hemostatic measures are vital for managing the penetrating trauma. Surgical intervention and ongoing medical care are essential for addressing internal damage and preventing complications.
description: The penetrating trauma of a deep stab pierces through layers of tissue, leaving a trail of destruction and pain in its wake. Each touch a torment, as the wound bleeds profusely and demands urgent attention.

name: Piercing Wound
treatment: Immediate wound care, including cleaning, disinfection, and appropriate dressing, is critical for preventing infection and promoting healing. Monitoring for signs of inflammation and seeking medical evaluation for deep punctures are essential for optimal recovery.
description: The sharp puncture of the piercing wound penetrates with pinpoint accuracy, leaving a pathway of destruction in its wake. Each stab, a jolt of searing pain, as the wound bleeds freely and demands attention.

name: Pinprick Of Pain
treatment: Clean and dress the wound with a healing salve or poultice.
description: The character feels a sudden sharp pain as if pricked by a hundred needles. The discomfort lingers, causing mild irritation and some difficulty in movement.

name: Rogue Needle Prick
treatment: Sip a cup of warming tea made from freshly squeezed kelp. Can be found at any apothecary.
description: A mischievous ghost has replaced your blood with cherry syrup. Attacks now pierce as if you're a gelatinous cube. Your party may notice a mysterious sweet scent following you around.

name: Spear In The Side
treatment: Stabilize the wound and rest to prevent aggravating the injury.
description: A sharp pain jolts through the character's side as if struck by a spear. The wound throbs persistently, making each movement a reminder of the injury.

name: Stabbed Flesh
treatment: Stabilizing the stabbed flesh with pressure and controlling bleeding are crucial steps in managing the injury. Seeking medical assessment for deeper penetration or potential organ involvement is essential for proper treatment and preventing complications.
description: The forceful stab into the flesh creates a cavity of agony, where tissue is rent asunder and nerves scream in protest. Each moment a symphony of pain, as the wound throbs with every heartbeat.

name: Stabbing Pain
treatment: Prompt wound care, including cleaning, disinfection, and dressing, is crucial for preventing infection and promoting healing. Monitoring for signs of complications and seeking medical evaluation for persistent pain are essential for effective management.
description: The stabbing pain of a puncture wound radiates with relentless intensity, a constant reminder of the invasive nature of the injury. Each breath a struggle, as the wound pulsates with a rhythm of its own.

name: Stuck Like A Thistle
treatment: Gently extract the thorn and apply a soothing ointment.
description: A small thorn-like protrusion remains embedded in the character's skin, causing discomfort whenever pressure is applied. Movement feels slightly hindered due to the irritation.

name: Tortle's Unlucky Jab
treatment: Embrace the gift and introduce yourself to the nearest zoo or circus. Carrots and leafy greens are now your go-to snack.
description: A clumsy tortle mistook your arm for a tree trunk. You now have the ability to stretch your neck like a giraffe - handy for high shelves, not so much in battle. Eating salads whole is the new style.

name: Chromatic Conundrum
treatment: Seek the help of an alchemist to create a potion that can stabilize the effects and reverse the poison's influence.
description: The character's skin starts changing colors randomly, as if affected by a magical poison. Each hue change comes with a wave of weakness and dizziness.

name: Mystical Mosquito Bites
treatment: Use a special salve made of rare herbs and arcane ingredients to soothe the bites and prevent further infestation.
description: The character is plagued by mystical mosquito bites that never seem to heal, leaving behind glowing welts that attract other insects.

name: Serpentine Sibilant Speaking
treatment: Speak only in rhymes for a full moon cycle
description: Your words now sound like a hissing serpent, which may cause misunderstandings during negotiations

name: Sneaky Sneeze Syndrome
treatment: Drink a special tea made from four rare herbs found in a hidden glade
description: You were hit by a mischievous druid's sneeze spell. Your sneezes are now random and may cause embarrassing situations

name: Toadstool Toenails
treatment: Apply a soothing cream made of rare mushroom spores to prevent further fungal growth.
description: The character's toenails have mysteriously transformed into tiny toadstools, causing mild discomfort and a musty smell that repels insects.

name: Toxic Toenail Trouble
treatment: Trim the nail under the light of a full moon, while singing a lullaby
description: Your big toenail has taken on a life of its own and may cause uncontrollable tap-dancing at awkward times

name: Venomous Hiccup Syndrom
treatment: Consume a concoction of herbal extracts to neutralize the venom and control the hiccups.
description: The character periodically suffers from venomous hiccups, causing small spurts of toxic gas to escape with each hiccup.

name: Venomous Vision Vertigo
treatment: Wear spectacles crafted from the web of a giant spider
description: Your eyes now perceive everything as if it's made of creepy crawlies. Try not to scream

name: Brain Fizzle
treatment: Meditation and mental rest may help alleviate the effects.
description: You feel a strange sensation in your head, as if your brain is fizzling like a poorly made potion. Thoughts become a bit hazy, and concentrating on tasks seems more challenging

name: Cerebral Backfire
treatment: Meditation and mental exercises are required to restore clarity of mind.
description: A backlash of psychic energy causes the victim's thoughts to ricochet, creating momentary lapses in memory and cognitive function.

name: Cerebral Overload
treatment: Seek help from skilled healers or those attuned to psychic energies to stabilize your mind from the overload.
description: Your mind feels like it's caught in a storm of chaotic thoughts, each vying for dominance. The mental strain is excruciating, making it hard to focus on anything but the overwhelming buzz in your head.

name: Cogitation Cramp
treatment: Drinking a concoction of herbal remedies can help alleviate the cramping.
description: A sudden surge of psychic energy causes sharp pain in the victim's head, making it hard to concentrate and cast spells.

name: Mindbender's Migraine
treatment: Seek out a powerful psychic healer or rest in a quiet, calming environment.
description: After a psychic attack, your mind feels like it's been tied in mental knots. Thoughts seem to echo loudly, causing sharp, sudden headaches.

name: Mindquake Madness
treatment: Rest and meditation can help alleviate the symptoms over time.
description: After a sudden burst of psychic energy, the victim's mind feels like shaken rubble, causing disorientation and difficulty focusing.

name: Psionic Echoes
treatment: Meditate and focus on aligning your mind. Distractions may make the echoes worse.
description: Psychic waves have left a lingering effect, making your own thoughts feel distant, as if being heard slightly delayed.

name: Psionic Feedback
treatment: Rest and mental relaxation are key to recovering from this powerful mental backlash.
description: A surge of mental energy overwhelms your senses, causing sharp pain behind your eyes and confusion in your thoughts. It's like a magic missile fired directly into your mind.

name: Psionic Meltdown
treatment: Only a skilled psychic healer can mend the shattered psyche of the victim.
description: The victim experiences a catastrophic surge of psychic power, overwhelming their senses and causing intense mental anguish.

name: Spiritual Static
treatment: Engage in calming activities and avoid mental strain until the effects wear off.
description: Your mind feels scrambled, like picking up a station between radio frequencies. It's as if your own thoughts are being overshadowed by a mysterious background noise.

name: Blinding Euphoria
treatment: Rest in a dark environment and avoid exposure to bright light.
description: The radiant magic coursing through you overwhelms your senses, causing a brief moment of euphoria. However, the intensity of the light leaves your vision temporarily dazzled.

name: Celestial Bruising
treatment: Rest and apply a soothing balm to ease the discomfort.
description: The radiant force strikes you, leaving behind vibrant, otherworldly bruises that pulse with soft light. Despite their beauty, they ache with a divine intensity.

name: Celestial Shimmer
treatment: Rest and exposure to natural light help to dissipate the celestial aura.
description: The affected area emits a soft, radiant glow that flickers like distant stars on a clear night. It causes a mild feeling of euphoria but leaves the skin slightly sensitive to magical auras.

name: Celestial Sunburn
treatment: Applying a soothing salve made of aloe vera leaves and holy water can help alleviate the discomfort and reduce the glowing effect.
description: After being exposed to a burst of radiant energy, your skin starts to shimmer with faint divine light, causing discomfort and sensitivity to sunlight. You feel like a walking beacon of celestial energy.

name: Cherubic Sunburn
treatment: Apply aloe vera or a cooling salve to soothe the affected skin.
description: A burst of radiant energy envelops you, leaving your skin tingling and red as if you spent too much time basking under the celestial sun.

name: Heavenly Glare
treatment: Rest, holy water baths, and prayers to radiant deities can help soothe the celestial burn.
description: A bright beam of radiant energy sears the affected area. The skin takes on a subtle, luminescent quality, giving off a soft light that attracts small creatures. It feels as if a small sun is trapped under the skin, warming from within.

name: Lightburn
treatment: Cooling salves and magical healing can alleviate the discomfort.
description: The afflicted area glows with a warm light, causing discomfort. It feels like being sunburnt by a celestial being. The radiance gradually fades but leaves the skin tender to the touch.

name: Luminous Wrath
treatment: Potent healing magic or divine intervention may be required to diminish the radiant essence infused within the body.
description: A burst of blinding radiant light engulfs the area, leaving behind an otherworldly mark. The skin becomes translucent, revealing an inner glow that can be seen faintly pulsing. It feels like having a miniature star trapped within, radiating heat and light.

name: Radiant Overload
treatment: Seek out a skilled healer to help regulate the radiant energy within you.
description: A surge of radiant power overwhelms you, causing your skin to glow brightly and emit a soft light. The excess energy burns within, threatening to consume you if not controlled.

name: Bleeding Edge
treatment: Applying pressure to the bleeding edge and elevating the affected limb can help stem the flow of blood and promote clotting. Seeking medical evaluation for deeper lacerations or signs of excessive bleeding is crucial for proper treatment.
description: The cutting edge of the blade opens a torrent of crimson, as blood spills from the lacerations like a scarlet river flowing unchecked. Each slash becomes a reminder of the body's vulnerability, as life essence escapes in a crimson dance.

name: Crimson Gash Of Carnage
treatment: Urgent magical healing or expert medical attention is necessary to prevent further complications or potential death.
description: A brutal slash carves through your flesh, leaving a deep, gaping wound that bleeds profusely. The pain is excruciating, and moving becomes a challenge as blood loss starts to take its toll.

name: Disembowelment Delight
treatment: Seek a skilled healer to make sure everything is back where it should be.
description: Your innards had a brief day out of your body before you managed to stuff them back in. Now, your once trusty armor seems a bit snug.

name: Gnash Wound
treatment: Apply a clean bandage and hope for the best.
description: A deep gash from a sharp blade that just won't stop bleeding, causing a trail of drips wherever you go. Your clothes are now the latest in gruesome fashion.

name: Jagged Gash
treatment: Careful cleaning and closure of the jagged gash are essential to prevent infection and promote proper healing. Monitoring for signs of inflammation or delayed healing can guide further treatment and prevent complications.
description: The jagged gash left by a slashing strike mirrors the chaos of battle, a ragged tear in the fabric of flesh that oozes with pain and pulsates with every heartbeat. Each movement a reminder of the jagged nature of the wound.

name: Lacerating Wound
treatment: Promptly cleaning and disinfecting the lacerating wound is crucial to prevent infection and promote healing. Proper wound care, bandaging, and monitoring for signs of complications are essential during the recovery process.
description: The sharp bite of the blade leaves a lacerating wound, tearing through flesh and rending skin with a merciless ferocity. Each slash, a symphony of pain, as the jagged edge cuts deep and leaves a trail of crimson in its wake.

name: Paper Cut From Hell
treatment: Apply a healing salve and try not to get any more paper cuts, especially from vicious monsters.
description: You yelp in surprise as you receive a minuscule cut, yet the pain that follows is disproportionate. It feels like a paper cut, but with the fury of a thousand devils.

name: Partially Severed Ligament
treatment: Seek immediate magical or expert medical attention to repair the ligament before the injury worsens.
description: An enemy's blade grazes you, leaving your ligament partially severed. The pain is sharp and intensifies with each movement you make, hindering your combat capabilities.

name: Rending Rift
treatment: Stabilizing the rending rift with sterile dressings and avoiding further trauma to the area are crucial for promoting healing. Seeking medical evaluation for deep wounds or signs of infection can prevent complications and aid in recovery.
description: The rending rift carved by a slashing blow leaves behind a gaping chasm of agony, where raw flesh and exposed nerves scream in protest. Each breath a torment, as the wound throbs with a rhythm of its own.

name: Sashimi Slice
treatment: Tape yourself back together with magic or healing potions.
description: A precise cut that leaves you feeling as thin and fragile as a piece of sashimi, making you more susceptible to further injuries.

name: Severed Limb
treatment: Immediate medical intervention is critical for addressing the severed limb, including controlling bleeding, stabilizing the patient, and ensuring proper wound management. Surgical measures and rehabilitation efforts are essential for the long-term well-being and functionality of the individual.
description: The brutal severing of a limb leaves a gaping void where once there was strength and mobility. The stark reality of the loss sends shockwaves through the body, as pain and disbelief collide in a cruel symphony of suffering.

name: Severed Strands
treatment: Seeking immediate medical attention to address the severed strands is essential to prevent further damage and facilitate healing. Surgical intervention and meticulous wound care may be necessary to restore function and prevent complications.
description: In the aftermath of a slashing strike, severed strands of flesh hang like tattered remnants of a once-whole canvas. The blade's keen edge cleaves through sinew and muscle, leaving a landscape of destruction in its wake.

name: Slashed Eye
treatment: Immediate evaluation by an ophthalmologist is essential for addressing the slashed eye, including measures to control bleeding, assess vision impairment, and prevent infection. Surgical intervention and ongoing care are crucial for restoring vision and preventing long-term complications.
description: The vicious slash across the eye sends shards of pain through the delicate orb, leaving a trail of crimson and blurred vision in its wake. The world shifts and distorts, a reminder of the fragility of sight in the face of a brutal assault. The dice have decided your fate: [[1d2]] The roll of a 1 = left and a 2 = right.

name: Tickle Of The Blade
treatment: Bandage the wound and rest for a short while to let it heal naturally.
description: You feel a light tickling sensation as if a mischievous imp is gently running a blade across your skin. The cut is shallow but surprisingly persistent, causing slight discomfort.

name: Whistle Wound
treatment: Have someone else do all the talking for you.
description: A nasty cut that, when you breathe or speak, lets out a high-pitched whistle that is quite distracting to you and your party members.

name: Ear-ringer
treatment: Resting in a quiet area for a few hours can alleviate the ringing. Alternatively, a caster could attempt to dispel the temporary deafness.
description: After a particularly loud thunderous boom, your ears start ringing incessantly. You find it hard to focus as the sound drowns out everything around you, making communication a challenge.

name: Ear-ringing Shockwave
treatment: To soothe your ears, you must rest in a quiet environment and avoid exposure to loud noises.
description: During a fierce thunderous clash, you found yourself too close to a deafening blast of sound. The intense pressure rattled your eardrums, leaving your hearing muddled and distant.

name: Ear-shattering Boom
treatment: Visit a skilled healer who can help recalibrate your inner ear balance, or endure the ringing until it fades naturally.
description: During a powerful thunderous strike, your ears are bombarded with a resonating boom that seems to linger. You can now hear everything as if you're underwater, with distant echoes distorting sounds around you. The louder the noise, the more painful the reverberation.

name: Eardrum Rupture
treatment: Seek out a skilled bard or healer to cast a mending spell on your ears. Avoid sudden loud noises to prevent further damage.
description: After being caught in a thunderous clap, your eardrums shatter, leaving you with muffled hearing and a tendency to yell everything you say. The world feels oddly silent; even the loudest noises dim in comparison to the constant ringing in your ears.

name: Electric Shockwave
treatment: Rest and avoid contact with water to prevent further electric surges.
description: Hit by a powerful burst of electricity, your muscles twitch uncontrollably and your nerves feel on edge.

name: Lightning Tickles
treatment: Massage the affected area to reduce the tingling sensation.
description: A bolt of lightning grazes your skin, leaving a tingling sensation and making it hard to hold onto things.

name: Roaring Thunderclap
treatment: Only the most skilled of healers can mend the internal damage caused by the thunderclap. Resting in complete silence may slowly restore your senses.
description: Caught in the epicenter of a deafening thunderclap, your very essence quivers in response to the overwhelming force. Your vision blurs, and even the slightest sound feels like a hammer blow.

name: Static Shock
treatment: Resting and grounding yourself by touching something conductive for a few hours can help dissipate the electric charge. A caster may also attempt to restore your nerve control.
description: A sudden jolt of electric energy courses through your body as if you've been struck by a lightning rod. Your muscles twitch uncontrollably, making precise movements a challenge.

name: Thunderous Migraine
treatment: Resting in a quiet and dark environment to ease the headache.
description: The booming thunder overhead triggers a debilitating headache that makes focusing on tasks a challenge.

name: Thunderstruck
treatment: Seeking shelter from further electrical discharges and resting for an extended period can help alleviate the effects. A skilled healer might be able to accelerate your recovery.
description: A direct hit from a powerful bolt of lightning leaves you feeling like you've danced with the storm itself. Your body tingles with residual electricity, and your movements are sluggish.
